base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bat_fly — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Vampire bat — 2-frame flap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Vampire bat — 2-frame flap; drains XP on hit
